'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 113''' is the one hundred thirteenth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[April 23]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[The Guardian of Forever!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[The Guardian of Forever!]]"
*"Heroes of the galaxy: Monark Starstalker Part 3: Confrontation in the snow!"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 23: Out of my mind!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: The search for Shanng!"
